_comment: Template for the song_digger eval set. Replace placeholder text with real tracks. Aim for 20-30 seeds total before relying on the metric. Distribution suggestions in 'extend-eval-set' skill.
_metric: nDCG@10 with grades: relevant=2, false_friend=0, unmarked=1

seeds.style_notes: Classic Pole Group hypnotic techno, ~134 BPM, dark, minor key, long-form structure

relevant.reason: Pole Group label, similar production aesthetic
Italian hypnotic techno scene, frequent label co-release

false_friends.reason: hard techno / trance, totally different character
minimal/high-tech-minimal, melodic, not the right mood

seeds.style_notes: Birmingham industrial techno, ~138 BPM, mechanical, sparse, repetitive
Dub techno, ~125 BPM, deep, ambient-leaning, long reverbs, sparse beat. Boundary case — should NOT recommend hypnotic techno just because of the 'techno' tag.

false_friends.reason: peak-time hypnotic, despite 'techno' tag, very different mood

seeds.style_notes: <describe the sonic character: subgenre, BPM, mood, label scene if relevant>

_seed_distribution_targets._note: Aim for this distribution. Use the extend-eval-set skill to add deliberately.
_seed_distribution_targets.classic_hypnotic: 6-8 seeds (Mulero, Reeko, Exium, Ancient Methods, etc)
_seed_distribution_targets.dub_techno: 4-5 seeds (Deepchord, Echospace, Rod Modell, Yagya) — boundary cases
_seed_distribution_targets.peak_time_as_false_friend_control: 3-4 seeds (Charlotte de Witte, I Hate Models, Adam Beyer) — system should NOT recommend these on hypnotic queries
_seed_distribution_targets.underground_low_popularity: 2-3 seeds (Ascion, Lewis Fautzi, Henning Baer, lesser-known)
_seed_distribution_targets.russian_or_cyrillic: 2-3 seeds — encoding edge case + scene coverage

_filling_guide.relevant_count_target: 8-10 per seed. Less than 6 hurts metric stability.
_filling_guide.false_friend_count_target: 4-6 per seed. These are the most informative — they catch failure modes.
_filling_guide.track_format: 'Artist - Track' string. Use the form most likely to appear in production output.
_filling_guide.case_sensitivity: Match logic is case-insensitive, but keep your originals consistent for readability.
